name: publish-prep
description: Example declarative extension that combines publish readiness metadata, frontmatter review, outlines, and safe Markdown transforms for static-site preparation.

permissions.reason: Reads publish frontmatter, headings, links, and checklist items already parsed from local Markdown notes.
Writes bounded heading cleanup, table-of-contents, and callout transforms into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Publish prep metadata
contributes.description: Declares fields useful for local static-site preflight review and agent publish-readiness notes.

contributes.label: Publish checklist
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported publish checklist sidebar widget.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter widget for publish status, slug, aliases, and review metadata.

contributes.label: Outline
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported outline widget for checking publish-page structure.

contributes.label: Normalize heading spacing
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for publish prep.

contributes.label: Insert generated table of contents
contributes.description: Declares the supported table-of-contents insertion transform for longer publish pages.

contributes.label: Wrap publish note as callout
contributes.description: Declares the supported callout transform for warnings, notes, and review caveats.
